movie.synopsis: Kantara Chapter 1 (2025) During the reign of Kadamba’s, the first dynasty of Karnataka, Bangra, a fictional feudatory ruled by King Vijayendra. Known to have pledged his loyalty to the Kadambas, he holds the command over their sea trade. King Vijayendra known for his valour is a feared leader who celebrated slavery and atheism.
